name: mc-v2-electron
description: Mission Control — Electron + Vite + React + TypeScript
author: Michael Treml

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web && npm run typecheck:tests
scripts.smoke: node --experimental-strip-types src/main/store.smoke.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/main/project-store.smoke.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/main/git-detect.smoke.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/main/run-manager.smoke.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/main/babysitter-runtime-prep.smoke.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/main/pi-session-manager.smoke.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/main/settings-store.smoke.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/main/library-walker.smoke.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/main/workflow-generator.smoke.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/main/workflow-creator.smoke.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/main/library-item-creator.smoke.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/main/item-info-store.smoke.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/main/memory-store.smoke.ts
scripts.test:replay: echo "No replay fixtures captured yet — see tests/replay/README.md" && exit 0
scripts.doctor: npm run typecheck && npm run smoke && npm run test:workflow && npm run build && npm run verify-ui
